note: Known contract labels for the monad-ops dashboard. Addresses are 0x-prefixed, lowercase, exactly 42 chars. Category is a short tag used for grouping in the UI. Community contributions welcome via PR — only add entries with an identifiable source (Monad docs, verified contract on MonadScan, universal EVM deterministic deployment). Conservative on purpose: a wrong label poisons the dataset more than a bare address ever could.
